label: Authorization policy (tenant defaults)
notes: Singleton tenant policy; restore writes via PATCH.

label: Users (selected directory metadata)
notes: High-volume and privacy-sensitive; opt in when user inventory belongs in the snapshot.

label: Devices (selected directory metadata)
notes: High-volume device inventory; opt in for full directory state comparisons.

label: Defender secure score snapshots
notes: Evidence snapshot for drift/audit, not a restore target.

label: Service principals (Enterprise apps) — large dataset
notes: Disabled by default — opt in only when you actually need it.

label: Admin consent request policy
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: B2B management policy (allow/deny domain list)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Entitlement: access packages
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target. Resource role scopes are exposed through assignment policies, not as an accessPackage expand.

label: Entitlement: catalogs
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Entitlement: assignment policies
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Entitlement: connected organizations
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Access review schedule definitions
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: PIM role management policies (Entra roles)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: PIM role management policy assignments
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: PIM role eligibility schedules (Entra roles)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Custom security attribute definitions
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Defender XDR alerts (alerts_v2)
notes: Posture/incident evidence snapshot (volume-capped); not a restore target.

label: Defender XDR incidents
notes: Posture/incident evidence snapshot (volume-capped); not a restore target.

label: Threat intelligence indicators (tiIndicators)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Defender TI articles
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Defender TI intel profiles (threat actors)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Purview Sensitivity Labels
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Purview Label Policy Settings (org)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Purview eDiscovery Cases
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: eSIM Activation Code Pools
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Mobile Threat Defense Connectors
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Compliance Management Partners
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Device Management Partners (EMM Connectors)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Exchange Connectors (Intune)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Data Sharing Consents
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: macOS Software Update Account Summaries (Evidence)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Windows Information Protection (WIP) Policies
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: MDM Windows Information Protection (WIP) Policies
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Imported ADMX (Uploaded Group Policy Definition Files)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Security Baseline Templates (Catalog)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Windows Autopilot Device Identities (Evidence)
notes: High-volume inventory evidence; not a restore target.

label: Windows Malware Information (Evidence)
notes: High-volume inventory evidence; not a restore target.

label: Teams Organization Settings (region / enablement)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Teams App Catalog (org/published apps inventory)
notes: Only the tenant's org-published apps — not Microsoft's global store (avoids backing up thousands of store apps).

label: Group Setting Templates (catalog reference)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Edge IE Mode Site Lists
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Service Announcement Messages (Message Center)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Service Health Overviews (evidence)
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Subscribed SKUs (license inventory)
notes: License inventory evidence; not a restore target.

label: App protection — default (managed) protections
notes: Backup/drift/audit evidence; not a restore target.

label: Enterprise code-signing certificates
notes: Certificate blob is not replayable from JSON; evidence only.

label: Apple VPP / Apps & Books tokens
notes: Token blob re-uploaded from ABM out-of-band; evidence only.

label: Resource access profiles (Wi-Fi / VPN / certificate)
notes: Base collection does not support $expand=assignments.

label: NDES / SCEP certificate connectors
notes: On-prem self-registering connector; health/inventory evidence.

label: Intune tenant settings (deviceManagement singleton)
notes: Tenant-level Intune settings/branding evidence; restore via PATCH only.

label: Intune RBAC role assignments
notes: Pairs with role-definitions to make Intune RBAC replayable.

label: Apple ABM/DEP onboarding settings (tokens)
notes: ABM token shells; binding re-established out-of-band. Evidence.

label: Apple ABM/DEP enrollment profiles
notes: Per-token Apple enrollment profiles; restore requires an active ABM token binding. Evidence.

label: Windows Autopilot tenant settings
notes: Operational evidence; not a restore target.

label: Apple MDM Push certificate (APNs)
notes: Cert/key not replayable; appleId+expiry evidence for DR.

label: Managed Google Play enterprise binding
notes: Binding established interactively; settings evidence only.

label: Cloud PC gallery images (catalog)
notes: Reference catalog evidence; not a restore target.

label: App Proxy connector groups
notes: Connectors self-register; topology evidence.

label: Multi-tenant organization (MTO) config
notes: MTO join is a handshake; config evidence.

label: Deleted groups (recycle bin)
notes: Recovery evidence; restore via /restore on the live tenant.

label: Deleted app registrations (recycle bin)
notes: Recovery evidence; restore via /restore on the live tenant.

label: Entra custom role definitions (restorable subset)
notes: Custom roles are POST-restorable, unlike the full built-in catalog.

label: PIM role eligibility schedule requests
notes: Requires Entra ID P2; request-history evidence.

label: Access review history definitions
notes: Requires Entra ID P2; evidence.

label: Lifecycle Workflows
notes: Needs LifecycleWorkflows.Read.All consent + Entra ID P2.

label: Lifecycle Workflows — custom task extensions
notes: Restore task extensions before workflows. Needs LifecycleWorkflows.Read.All.

label: Terms of Use agreements
notes: PDF files round-trip out-of-band. Needs Agreement.Read.All consent.

label: Identity providers (social / external)
notes: Client secrets are masked. Needs IdentityProvider.Read.All consent.

label: Company branding (sign-in page)
notes: Text settings and image URLs; binary logo/background assets round-trip out-of-band. Needs Organization.Read.All consent. Evidence.

label: GDAP delegated admin relationships
notes: Partner GDAP evidence. Needs DelegatedAdminRelationship.Read.All consent.

label: BitLocker recovery keys (DR evidence)
notes: High-value DR evidence. Needs BitlockerKey.Read.All consent.

label: LAPS device local admin credentials (DR evidence)
notes: High-value DR evidence. Needs DeviceLocalCredential.Read.All consent.

label: Microsoft Search bookmarks
notes: Needs SearchConfiguration.Read.All consent.

label: Microsoft Search acronyms
notes: Needs SearchConfiguration.Read.All consent.

label: Microsoft Search Q&As
notes: Needs SearchConfiguration.Read.All consent.

label: Microsoft Bookings businesses
notes: Needs Bookings.Read.All consent.

label: Teams custom team templates
notes: Needs TeamTemplates.Read.All consent.

label: M365 Backup — SharePoint protection policies
notes: Needs BackupRestore-Configuration.Read.All consent.

label: M365 Backup — OneDrive protection policies
notes: Needs BackupRestore-Configuration.Read.All consent.

label: M365 Backup — Exchange protection policies
notes: Needs BackupRestore-Configuration.Read.All consent.

label: Universal Print — tenant settings
notes: Needs PrintSettings.Read.All consent.

label: Universal Print — printer shares
notes: Needs PrinterShare.Read.All consent.

label: Global Secure Access — forwarding profiles
notes: Needs NetworkAccess.Read.All consent + GSA licensing.

label: Global Secure Access — filtering policies
notes: Needs NetworkAccess.Read.All consent + GSA licensing.

label: Global Secure Access — remote networks
notes: Needs NetworkAccess.Read.All consent + GSA licensing.

label: Global Secure Access — branch sites
notes: Needs NetworkAccess.Read.All consent + GSA licensing.
